anti_patterns.title: Full product navigation dilutes the campaign
anti_patterns.do_not: Bring a broad product-site navigation into a page whose job is to focus attention on one event or drop.

anti_patterns.title: Countdown without an actionable deadline
anti_patterns.do_not: Show a countdown when the page does not make the real deadline and the next participant action clear.

anti_patterns.title: Launch visuals do not identify the launch
anti_patterns.do_not: Use energetic campaign imagery without showing what is being released, where, or when.
